working_tree_state: Approved terminology, portability, and documentation changes applied after the base revision
publication_processing: The three hazard panels use the same 1189x568-pixel crop. The waveform is cropped to 1440x520 pixels to remove unused lower workspace without rescaling or distortion.

screenshots.demonstrates: Current landing page, upload control, workflow, and prerequisites
Back-to-back arithmetic dependencies with both EX forwarding selectors active
Taken BEQ in EX, target 0x20, and flush of younger IF/ID instructions
Load-use dependency with pc_write=0, if_stall=1, and id_stall=1
Bundled Surfer displaying the Level 4 clock, completion, EX destination, stall, and PC-write signals

privacy_review: Browser chrome, accounts, notifications, hostnames, and machine-specific paths are absent. Only localhost URLs appear where the waveform source is visible.
